Catalog & Stock

Every model from the current collection. Tap In / Low / Out to update stock — it's tagged with your name and saved automatically on this device.

You're viewing as Guest — stock and pricing are read-only.

Sales LOG IT YOURSELF FOR NOW

Log a sale the moment it happens. Once Shopify is connected this fills in on its own — for now, this already gives you real totals and a top-sellers list.

Marketing & Ads

Content plan and media buying in one place. Log campaigns manually until Meta Ads is connected — spend and cost-per-result totals below are already real once you start logging.

You're viewing as Guest — campaigns, calendar and notes are read-only.

Log a campaign / boost

Pull these numbers from Meta Ads Manager after each campaign — spend, results, and cost per result are the three that matter most for deciding what to scale.

Campaign log

Content calendar — this week

Saved Replies

Copy-paste templates for whoever's replying to comments and DMs, so the tone stays consistent no matter who's answering. Fill in the [brackets] before sending. Add your own below — they'll show up for everyone on this device.

Finances

Cost price, margin, and every expense outside the watches themselves — built for whoever prices the models and handles the books.

Model costing & margin

Enter the landed cost per model (unit cost + import/customs, however you calculate it). Margin updates instantly against the retail price already in the catalog.

Log an expense

Expense log

Tax & compliance notes

For whoever handles VAT, customs, and filings — a shared place to leave notes instead of a side conversation nobody else sees.

Documents & Passwords

Shared logins, account recovery details, and important links for Morin, Abdelrahman and Ahmed only — locked behind a separate password from your login PIN.

🔒

Enter the shared password

Ask whoever last set it if you don't have it. You can change it once inside.

Add an entry

e.g. Shopify admin login, domain registrar, GitHub, hosting recovery email — anything the three of you need and shouldn't lose track of.

Saved entries

Prototype built from the Current Collection PDF and product pricing sheets. Prices marked "price not set", all stock levels, and every log below are placeholders for the team to fill in — everything you enter saves to this device only.
